Extract the issue/PR number referenced in this commit message. Respond with only the number, with or without a leading '#'.

Fix race condition in state writer (#845)

Root cause was a non-atomic write to the state file under concurrent updates.
Switched to write-then-rename pattern.

Title: refactor: simplify orchestrator state management
